name: Mountain
visual_description: A rugged mountain dominates the panoramic landscape, its slopes glowing faintly with bioluminescent warmth. Precise geometric bunker entrances and ventilation shafts scar the stone face—too angular to be natural. Strange flickering lights emanate from within the dark shafts, illuminating weathered rock and ancient machinery half-buried beneath.
full_prompt: A rugged mountain dominates the panoramic landscape, its slopes glowing faintly with bioluminescent warmth. Precise geometric bunker entrances and ventilation shafts scar the stone face—too angular to be natural. Strange flickering lights emanate from within the dark shafts, illuminating weathered rock and ancient machinery half-buried beneath.. Stylized digital illustration, panoramic landscape, dramatic atmospheric perspective, concept-art establishing shot, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
